social_media.name: Instagram
social_media.notes: Limited DM automation via official API. Use Manychat for full automation. Business/Creator accounts only.

social_media.name: Facebook
social_media.notes: Better API support than Instagram. Messenger automation available.

social_media.name: LinkedIn
social_media.notes: Official API limited. Use Linked API ($49/mo) for full automation including connection requests and messaging.

google_workspace.name: Gmail
google_workspace.notes: Full email automation. 1000 sends/day quota. OAuth 2.0 required.

google_workspace.name: Google Calendar
google_workspace.notes: Full event management. Supports recurring events, reminders, attendees.

crm_automation.name: GoHighLevel
crm_automation.notes: Comprehensive CRM automation. OAuth 2.0 for multi-location. Rate limits: 100 req/10sec, 200k/day.
crm_automation.cost: Agency Pro plan required for advanced API

meeting_tools.name: Fathom
meeting_tools.notes: Meeting notes, transcripts, summaries. Works with Zoom, Meet, Teams. Zapier integration available.

ai_image_generation.name: Google Vertex AI Imagen 3
ai_image_generation.notes: Highest quality image generation. Imagen 3 released Dec 2024. Supports editing, upscaling, brand customization.

ai_image_generation.name: OpenAI DALL-E 3
ai_image_generation.notes: High quality images. Better prompt understanding. Standard/Revised quality options.

ai_image_generation.name: Midjourney
ai_image_generation.notes: No official API. Must use Discord bot automation. Risk of ToS violation.

coding.name: GitHub Copilot / Anthropic
coding.notes: AI coding assistants. Claude 3.5 Sonnet via API for code generation.
